# 1Idea AI SaaS Platform

> AI-powered productivity and automation platform for turning ideas into reality.

## What is 1Idea?

1Idea is an AI-powered SaaS platform that helps creators, developers, and innovators transform their ideas into production-ready results. Our platform provides cutting-edge tools for content creation, design, development, and automation.

## Platform Features

- AI Tools Marketplace: Browse 150+ AI tools for productivity, development, design, and marketing
- Blog CMS: 100+ expert articles on AI tools, SaaS development, productivity strategies, and future technology
- Admin Dashboard: Complete content management and analytics
- PWA Support: Install on any device for native-like experience

## Pages

- / - Homepage with feature overview
- /features - Detailed platform features
- /pricing - Subscription plans (Starter free, Pro $29, Enterprise custom)
- /tools - AI tools marketplace with search and filters
- /blog - 100 SEO-optimized articles on AI and SaaS topics
- /about - Company story and team
- /contact - Contact form and information
- /login - User authentication
- /signup - Account creation

## Blog Categories

- AI Tools (20 articles): AI productivity tools, ChatGPT alternatives, automation platforms
- AI Automation (15 articles): Workflow automation, AI agents, business automation
- SaaS (15 articles): SaaS business models, growth strategies, pricing models
- Productivity (15 articles): AI time management, remote work tools, productivity workflows
- Marketing (15 articles): AI marketing, content strategy, SEO optimization
- Development (10 articles): AI coding assistants, app development, APIs
- Future Technology (10 articles): AI trends, future of work, AI ethics

## API Endpoints

- GET /api/blog - Fetch all blog posts with metadata
- GET /api/blog?slug=xxx - Fetch single post by slug
- POST /api/contact - Send contact form message
- POST /api/auth/login - User authentication
- POST /api/auth/signup - User registration

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 14, React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage)
- Icons: Lucide React
- Animations: Framer Motion

## Installation

Add to home screen for the best experience on mobile devices.

## Contact

- Email: hello@1idea.ai
- Location: San Francisco, CA
